sourceBasis: Behavioral parity targets derived solely from official ERPNext (docs.erpnext.com) and Frappe Framework (frappeframework.com / docs.frappe.io / github.com/frappe) documentation. No ERPNext/Frappe source code or UI assets were inspected or copied. Implementation is original clean-room C#/.NET. See docs/reports/ERP_CLONE_LICENSE_AND_CLEAN_ROOM_DECISION.md.

priorityLegend.P0: Minimal real ERP core: setup, accounting GL, inventory, sales, purchase, payments, workflow, audit, RBAC, key reports, REST APIs.

statusLegend.implementationStatus: NotStarted | InProgress | Complete (orchestrator updates after building).
statusLegend.parityScore: 0-100 behavioral-parity self-assessment against the official-doc target (orchestrator updates).

features.businessPurpose: Represents a legal entity that owns the books of accounts; root of accounting, taxation, and the default cost center / warehouse for all transactions.
requiredWorkflows: Create company and auto-provision default Chart of Accounts, root Cost Center and root Warehouse
requiredTests: Creating a company seeds default CoA, cost center, warehouse
Company default accounts resolve in transactions
features.notes: Default currency and abbreviation drive numbering and account naming.

features.businessPurpose: Defines the accounting period boundaries used to scope GL posting, period closing, and financial statements.
requiredWorkflows: Resolve fiscal year from posting date
Block posting outside open fiscal years
requiredTests: Posting date maps to correct fiscal year
Posting into closed year is rejected

features.businessPurpose: Enables multi-currency transactions; stores exchange rates so foreign-currency documents post to the GL in company base currency.
requiredWorkflows: Convert document currency to base currency at posting
requiredTests: Foreign-currency invoice posts base-currency GL using stored rate
features.notes: Base currency = company currency; transaction currency may differ.

features.businessPurpose: Hierarchical tree of ledger and group accounts (Asset, Liability, Income, Expense, Equity) that all GL postings reference.
requiredTests: Group accounts cannot be posted to
Account root type drives report classification
features.notes: Standard CoA template seeded per company.

features.businessPurpose: Dimensional tag on GL entries enabling departmental/branch profitability and budget tracking independent of the account.
requiredWorkflows: Tag GL entries with cost center

features.businessPurpose: Generates sequential, prefix-based, gapless document identifiers (e.g. SINV-.YYYY.-#####) for auditability and legal numbering requirements.
requiredWorkflows: Atomically increment counter on document save
requiredTests: Concurrent saves produce no duplicate numbers
Series pattern tokens (year, prefix) expand correctly
features.notes: Must be concurrency-safe under SQL Server.

features.businessPurpose: Defines sales/purchase tax templates, rates, and account heads applied to transaction lines and totals for compliant tax calculation.
requiredWorkflows: Post tax to designated GL heads
requiredTests: On-net and on-total tax types calculate correctly
Tax posts to configured account head
features.notes: Charge types: On Net Total, On Previous Row Amount/Total, Actual.

features.businessPurpose: Supports several legal entities in one install with isolated books and optional inter-company transactions/consolidation.
requiredApis: Company filter on all financial endpoints

features.businessPurpose: Models multiple physical/logical stock locations as a warehouse tree so stock is tracked per location and optionally linked to inventory accounts.
requiredTests: Perpetual inventory posts to warehouse account

features.businessPurpose: Role-based access control: per-role, per-doctype read/write/create/delete/submit/cancel/amend/print/email/import/export rights plus permission levels.
requiredTests: Submit/cancel rights enforced separately from write
features.notes: Mirror Frappe role-permission semantics; not user/role data.

features.businessPurpose: Restricts a user to specific records of a linked master (e.g. only Company X, Warehouse Y) for fine-grained data scoping.
requiredWorkflows: Define allowed values per user per master
features.notes: Row-level filter layered on top of role permissions.

features.businessPurpose: General-purpose double-entry voucher where total debits equal total credits; used for adjustments, payroll, depreciation, inter-company entries.
requiredUiScreens: Journal Entry form with line grid

features.businessPurpose: Records receipt/payment/internal-transfer of money and allocates it against outstanding invoices, updating party balances and the GL.
requiredWorkflows: Submit posts GL and reduces outstanding
requiredUiScreens: Payment Entry form with reference allocation grid
requiredTests: GL posts to bank/cash and party account
features.notes: Supports advance payments and multi-currency settlement.

features.businessPurpose: Central immutable ledger: every submitted accounting document writes balanced GL Entries; cancellation writes reversing entries. Single source of financial truth.
requiredWorkflows: Generate balanced GL entries on submit
requiredUiScreens: GL Entry drill-down from any voucher
features.notes: Append-only; corrections via reversal, never edit.

features.businessPurpose: Tracks money owed by customers: outstanding sales invoices, ageing buckets, and collection status by party.
requiredTests: Ageing buckets total to AR balance

features.businessPurpose: Tracks money owed to suppliers: outstanding purchase invoices, ageing, and payment scheduling by party.
requiredTests: Ageing buckets total to AP balance

features.businessPurpose: Detailed transaction listing per account/party/cost-center over a period with running balance; the primary audit/drill report.
requiredWorkflows: Filter by account, party, cost center, project, period

features.businessPurpose: Per-account opening, debit, credit, and closing balances proving total debits equal total credits across the ledger.
requiredWorkflows: Aggregate debit/credit per account for period
requiredTests: Group rollups equal sum of children

features.businessPurpose: Income-statement view: income minus expense over a period yielding net profit, by period column and cost center.
requiredTests: Period columns sum to total column
features.notes: Net profit flows to Balance Sheet equity.

features.businessPurpose: Statement of financial position: Assets = Liabilities + Equity (including current-period earnings) as of a date.
Closes income/expense balances into a retained-earnings account at year end so the new year opens clean.
requiredWorkflows: Post closing entry to retained earnings
requiredTests: Income/expense net to zero after closing
Retained earnings credited with net profit

features.businessPurpose: Central catalog of products/services with UOM, valuation method, stock flag, default warehouse, and accounting defaults used across selling, buying, and stock.
requiredWorkflows: Create item with UOM and valuation method
features.notes: Valuation method (FIFO/Moving Average) frozen after first stock transaction.

features.businessPurpose: Hierarchical classification of items used for defaults, reporting groupings, and price/tax rules.
Immutable per-movement record (qty in/out, valuation rate, balance qty, balance value) per item+warehouse; the source of truth for stock quantity and value.
requiredWorkflows: Append SLE on every stock movement
features.notes: Append-only, mirrors GL discipline for stock.

features.businessPurpose: Current on-hand quantity and value per item per warehouse as of a date, for stock-take and valuation.
requiredWorkflows: Aggregate latest balance per item+warehouse as of date
requiredTests: Balance matches sum of SLE movements

features.businessPurpose: Records material receipt, issue, transfer, manufacture, and reconciliation movements with optional additional costs affecting valuation.
requiredUiScreens: Stock Entry form with item grid
features.notes: Also covers stock reconciliation/adjustment use case.

features.businessPurpose: Computes valuation rate on consumption using FIFO queue or Moving Average so COGS and stock value are accurate.
requiredTests: Valuation method immutable after first transaction
features.notes: Default FIFO; method locked after first stock transaction.

features.businessPurpose: Automatically posts GL entries for stock movements (stock-in-hand, COGS, stock received but not billed) keeping inventory accounts synced with the stock ledger.
requiredWorkflows: On stock movement, post matching GL
Reconcile stock value to ledger account
requiredTests: Inventory GL value equals SLE value
features.notes: Can be toggled off (periodic) per company.

features.businessPurpose: Party master for buyers holding billing/shipping, credit limit, price list, and receivable account defaults.
requiredWorkflows: Resolve receivable account/price list in sales docs
features.notes: Customer group is a tree master.

features.businessPurpose: Non-binding price proposal to a customer or lead that can be converted into a Sales Order.
requiredTests: No stock/GL impact at quotation stage
features.notes: Can be raised against Lead or Customer.

features.businessPurpose: Confirmed customer commitment that drives downstream delivery and billing, with per-line delivered/billed tracking.
requiredWorkflows: Create Delivery Note / Sales Invoice from SO
Track delivered & billed qty per line
requiredReports: Sales Order analysis / pending to deliver
requiredTests: Billed/delivered status updates from downstream docs

features.businessPurpose: Bills the customer, posts receivable and income to the GL, applies taxes, and (if update-stock) moves inventory.
requiredWorkflows: Draft -> Submit (post GL/AR, optional SLE) -> Cancel

features.businessPurpose: Records goods shipped to the customer; on submit creates outgoing Stock Ledger Entries (and COGS under perpetual inventory).
Party master for vendors holding payable account, currency, and purchase defaults.
requiredWorkflows: Resolve payable account in purchase docs

features.businessPurpose: Formal order to a supplier that drives receipt and billing, with per-line received/billed tracking.
requiredReports: Purchase Order analysis / pending to receive
requiredTests: Received/billed status updates from downstream docs

features.businessPurpose: Records the supplier bill, posts payable and expense/asset to the GL, applies taxes, and (if update-stock) receives inventory.
requiredWorkflows: Draft -> Submit (post GL/AP, optional SLE) -> Cancel

features.businessPurpose: Records goods received from a supplier; on submit creates incoming Stock Ledger Entries and (perpetual) stock-received-but-not-billed GL.
Captures a potential customer's interest before qualification; convertible to Opportunity/Customer.
Qualified sales prospect with expected value and stage; convertible to Quotation.
Container for tasks, timesheets, and costing that tracks progress, billing, and profitability of a body of work.
requiredWorkflows: Roll up task completion and cost
requiredTests: Percent complete rolls up from tasks

features.businessPurpose: Unit of work under a project with status, dependencies, and assignment.
requiredTests: Dependent task cannot start before predecessor

features.businessPurpose: Records time logged against tasks/projects for costing and billing; can feed Sales Invoice and payroll.
Customer support ticket capturing problem, status, priority, and resolution, optionally linked to an SLA.
Tracks response/resolution deadlines per priority and escalates or flags breaches.
Tracks fixed assets with acquisition value, depreciation schedule, and book value; integrates with accounting.
requiredTests: Depreciation reduces book value over schedule

features.businessPurpose: Schedules and logs preventive/corrective maintenance tasks against assets.
requiredTests: Next due date advances on completion

features.businessPurpose: Defines components, quantities, operations, and costing needed to manufacture an item; basis for Work Orders and material planning.
Authorizes production of a quantity of a finished item per a BOM, driving material issue and finished-goods receipt.
features.notes: Consumes raw materials, yields finished goods.

features.businessPurpose: Records acceptance/rejection of items against quality parameters at receipt, production, or delivery.
requiredWorkflows: Block transaction if inspection required and failing
features.notes: Can be mandatory via item/BOM flag.

features.businessPurpose: Master record for staff holding personal, employment, department, and reporting-structure data; basis for HR and payroll.
features.notes: HR app (frappe/hrms) is GPLv3; clean-room target only.

features.businessPurpose: Defines earning/deduction components and a salary structure to compute a Salary Slip; minimal skeleton for payroll posting.
features.notes: Skeleton scope: structure -> slip -> JE; statutory tax rules out of scope for now.

features.businessPurpose: Fast retail checkout that creates a Sales Invoice with immediate payment; skeleton scope = cart, item lookup, payment, invoice creation.
features.notes: Skeleton only; offline sync out of scope.

features.businessPurpose: Self-service web portal for customers/suppliers to view their orders, invoices, and tickets; skeleton scope = authenticated read views.
requiredTests: Portal user sees only own party data

features.businessPurpose: Public catalog and shopping-cart skeleton that turns published items into web orders/quotations.
Generic reporting layer (filters, columns, grouping, export) that all financial and operational reports plug into for a consistent UX.
requiredReports: Hosts GL, Trial Balance, P&L, Balance Sheet, Stock, AR/AP reports
features.notes: Shared substrate for ACC-006..009, INV-003/004, AR/AP.

features.businessPurpose: At-a-glance KPI cards and charts (cash, receivables, sales trend) aggregating ledger/stock data for management.
features.notes: Must follow LocalAIFactory cached-aggregation rules (no GroupBy-constant).

features.businessPurpose: Configurable state machine with states, transitions, and per-transition allowed roles enforcing maker-checker / approval separation of duties.
features.notes: Critical for banking-grade separation of duties.

features.businessPurpose: Submittable-document semantics (Draft 0 / Submitted 1 / Cancelled 2): submitted docs are immutable, corrections via cancel+amend, preserving audit integrity.
Records who changed what and when on every document (field-level diffs) for traceability and compliance.
requiredTests: Each edit produces a version entry

features.businessPurpose: Immutable log of logins, submits, cancels, and sensitive actions for security audit and incident investigation.
requiredWorkflows: Log auth events and document submit/cancel

features.businessPurpose: Uniform REST surface to list/get/create/update/delete documents with filtering, pagination, and field selection — the integration backbone.
features.notes: Behavioral parity with Frappe resource API conventions; original implementation.

features.businessPurpose: Calls whitelisted server methods (submit, cancel, convert, run report) and authenticates via api_key:api_secret token in the Authorization header.
features.notes: Mirror token scheme conventions; do not copy Frappe auth code.

features.businessPurpose: Bulk-create/update records from CSV/XLSX with template generation, field mapping, validation, and per-row error reporting.
Exports list/report data to CSV/XLSX honoring filters and permissions for offline analysis and backup.
Add user-defined fields to standard documents without code, persisted and surfaced in forms, APIs, and reports.
requiredWorkflows: Define custom field on a doctype
requiredApis: custom fields included in resource API
requiredTests: Custom field saved + returned by API
features.notes: Metadata-driven extensibility; banking estate needs domain fields.

features.businessPurpose: Lets admins configure per-document naming series patterns/prefixes and current counters at runtime.
requiredTests: Pattern change applies to next document

features.businessPurpose: Override standard field properties (mandatory, hidden, label, read-only, options) per doctype without altering core code.

updatedBy: ERP-GENERATION-PROOF 2026-06-21: statuses reflect the built LAF Enterprise ERP
